name: Sexual Harassment in a Predominantly Female Workplace
description:
"If you want that promotion, you’ll have to be extra nice to me~."

"You’re too cute to be stuck in sales. Want to come to my office after hours~?"

"Let me know if you ever want a ‘private tour’ of the office~."

Welcome to Venture's Co.! We're honored to have you aboard the sales department!

(TW: Sexual Harassment, Non-con)


Venture's Co. is a multi-million dollar company established in 1990 by Margaret Singer, who revolutionized the field of business for women by creating the first all-women's company...until now!

Here at Venture, we're proud to honored bluster that our company has a population of 99% woman, leaving you as the only male. Many of our sales representatives are eager and hungry to devour you after they heard about the new fresh meat recruited. To maximize your comfort and performance at our growing company, you'll be imposed to:

  • Unwanted physical contact such as groping, hugging, and kissing

  • Persistent sexual jokes, cat-calling, and leering

  • Unsolicited explicit photos, emails, and jokes

  • Unconsensual sexual advances

  • 0.001% chances of promotion (higher if you're a good boy)

  • Ignored reports to HR

So, settle yourself in and meet the team! Because, at Venture, we deliver quality, reliable supply solutions! ✨

⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆

"Sexual Harassment in a Predominantly Female Workplace" is an import of one of my bots from Yodayo. Yes, you're surrounded by women and its easy to engage in smut; it was originally to explore what its like to be at the opposite end of sexual harassment and reverse roles.

I do explore reverse roles (dominant woman, submissive male) sometimes in bots with less serious undertones than this one. If you'd like to see more, I could import or create some more from your ideas and feedback.

I hope you appreciated my first bot in JanitorAI. There'll be more to come, so consider following. If you want the FemPOV, you can find it here.
